_comment: #112 state-writer guard registry. mutateTaskStateUnderLock is the canonical atomic way to change task.json; every direct writeTaskState( caller under lib/, scripts/, hooks/ must be a justified exception listed here. A new unlisted caller fails check-state-writers; an entry that no longer calls writeTaskState is flagged stale so this list shrinks as writers migrate. See docs/state-management.md.

allowed.lib/task-state.mjs: Defines writeTaskState — the blind-write primitive mutateTaskStateUnderLock and the bootstrap path both build on.
allowed.lib/gatectl.mjs: advanceHumanGate applies ONE validated human transition and has its own stale-gate precondition (refuses when the on-disk gate is not the expected one) — a guarded transition, not a silent snapshot-merge.
allowed.lib/workflow/backend-ready.mjs: Applies a computed lane transition to a state passed in by the orchestrator (single-writer), not a read-then-merge.
allowed.lib/workflow/bootstrap-task-state.mjs: Bootstraps fresh task state — a blind write by design (must be able to write over a missing file). stateVersion seeds at 0 here.
allowed.lib/workflow/bug-handoff.mjs: Applies a computed lane transition to a passed-in state (single-writer).
allowed.lib/workflow/lanes/chore.mjs: Applies computed chore-lane transitions to a passed-in state (single-writer).
allowed.lib/workflow/lanes/feature.mjs: Applies computed feature-lane transitions to a passed-in state (single-writer).
allowed.scripts/gatectl.mjs: CLI writes a state the caller supplies — an operator tool, not a concurrent hook.
allowed.scripts/init-task-state.mjs: Bootstraps fresh task state (blind write by design).
allowed.scripts/session-start.mjs: Bootstraps / reconciles task state at SessionStart (blind write by design).
